title: cachrys denticulata
intro: Cachrys denticulata, also known as Ajania, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the daisy family (Asteraceae). This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cachrys denticulata include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and improving immune function. It can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or capsules, as well as being used in topical applications to promote wound healing and skin health.
